TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_puqing_tayal, title = puqing_tayal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/puqing_tayal} }

S.FORM: puqing tayal ga t'aring squ Pinsbkan Papakwaqa kwara kawas nya qa maki payat seng kawas ma cyux qutux krahu balay tunux maki sa babaw Papakwaqa maki qutux ryax, mhutaw lhzyal tunux qani ru bka tunux qani la, kahul zik tunux qani qa, mhtuw sazing mlikuy ru qutux kneril ana ga qutux mlikuy sazing nha qa msyax iyal wagi roziq nya, yasa ini soya maki tanux tunux qani, wa si usa zik tunux la, thay qu qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril qani la, nha sazing hi qa puqing ni Atayal balay.

puqing tayal ga t'aring squ Pinsbkan Papakwaqa kwara kawas nya qa maki payat seng kawas ma cyux qutux krahu balay tunux maki sa babaw Papakwaqa maki qutux ryax, mhutaw lhzyal tunux qani ru bka tunux qani la, kahul zik tunux qani qa, mhtuw sazing mlikuy ru qutux kneril ana ga qutux mlikuy sazing nha qa msyax iyal wagi roziq nya, yasa ini soya maki tanux tunux qani, wa si usa zik tunux la, thay qu qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril qani la, nha sazing hi qa puqing ni Atayal balay.
S.PHON: puqiŋ tajal ɣa tʔariŋ s~ɕqu pins~ɕβkan papakwaqa kwara kawas~ɕ nja qa maki pajat s~ɕeŋ kawas~ɕ ma ʦ~ʨjux qutux kraħu βalaj tunux maki s~ɕa βaβaw papakwaqa maki qutux rjax, mħutaw lħzjal tunux qani ru βka tunux qani la, kaħul zik tunux qani qa, mħtuw s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj ru qutux kneril ana ɣa qutux mlikuj s~ɕaziŋ nħa qa ms~ɕjax ijal waɣi roziq nja, jas~ɕa ini s~ɕoja maki tanux tunux qani, wa s~ɕi us~ɕa zik tunux la, tħaj qu qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril qani la, nħa s~ɕaziŋ ħi qa puqiŋ ni atajal βalaj.
